Jwt._comment: SigningKey below is a placeholder, NOT a real secret. Every real environment (including local dev) must override it via 'dotnet user-secrets set Jwt:SigningKey ...' or an environment variable — never commit a production signing key here (api-layer.md 2.7, ADR-0026).

Seed._comment: Bootstrap SuperAdmin account (api-layer.md 2.7). Leave both empty to skip seeding (e.g. production, where the account should be provisioned out-of-band).
